data.title: Huge Bitcoin Seizure: 14.2 Billion Ended up in US Reserve, But the Plan is at Risk
data.description:
The US seized 127,000 BTCs linked to the Chinese 'Sha Zhu' scam and established the Strategic Bitcoin Reserve.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/bitcoin/huge-bitcoin-seizure-14-2-billion-ended-up-in-us-reserve-but-the-plan-is-at-risk/

data.title: Low Risk of Weak Random Keys in Mainstream Wallets, Says Expert
data.description: According to BlockBeats, SlowMist founder Yu Jian stated that the majority of cryptocurrency users need not worry about their private keys or mnemonic phrases being compromised due to weak randomness. He emphasized that the risk associated with mainstream open-source wallets in this regard is minimal. However, he cautioned that if any organization or institution were to possess a zero-day vulnerability in the related algorithms, it could lead to catastrophic consequences.

data.title: Bitget launches the 48th Crazy Thursday event, with a total prize pool of 40,000 BGB
data.description: Bitget launched its 48th Crazy Thursday event, unlocking 40,000 BGB by trading futures contracts in BTC, TAO, ZORA, and other cryptocurrencies. During the event, users with cumulative futures trading volume exceeding 100,000 USDT in the participating cryptocurrencies will receive one airdrop, with a maximum of 10 airdrops. Additionally, the top 1,000 users by cumulative futures trading volume in the participating cryptocurrencies will each receive 20 BGB. The event ends at 11:59:59 AM (UTC+8) on October 22nd.

data.title: Astra Nova (RVV) to be Listed on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Alpha will list and open trading for Astra Nova (RVV) at 9:00 PM (GMT+8) on October 18, 2025. Additionally, Binance Futures will launch RVVUSDT perpetual contracts at 9:30 PM (GMT+8) on October 18, 2025, with up to 50x leverage.

data.title: CME Group's Cryptocurrency Derivatives Trading Volume Hits Record High in Q3 2025
data.description: According to PANews, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) Group achieved a record-breaking cryptocurrency derivatives trading volume in the third quarter of 2025, reaching $901 billion.

data.title: CME Reports Record Cryptocurrency Futures and Options Trading Volume in Q3
data.description: According to Foresight News, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) reported that its cryptocurrency futures and options trading volume surpassed $900 billion in the third quarter, marking a historic high. The average daily open interest (ADOI) for these products also reached a new peak of $31.3 billion during the quarter, with nominal open interest (OI) hitting a record $39 billion on September 18. Additionally, the number of large open interest holders (LOIH) recorded for the week of September 16 was 1,014.

data.title: The $140 million short BTC whale currently holds long positions in ETH and BTC, with a position value of nearly $35 million
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that the whale who shorted BTC with $140 million currently holds 3 times ETH and 5 times BTC long positions, including: ETH long position: position value of $27.23 million, opening price of $4,054; BTC long position: position value of $7.61 million, opening price of $111,066.

data.title: BlackRock and others dump riskier credit as tight spreads raise alarm
data.description:
Big investors are backing off riskier credit after a record run that left debt markets looking stretched. BlackRock, M&G, and Fidelity International are all cutting exposure to lower-rated corporate bonds, moving into safer assets as US credit spreads shrink to near crisis-era lows, according to the Financial Times. This retreat comes amid growing fear that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/blackrock-and-others-dump-riskier-credit/

data.title: Federal Reserve Expected to Cut Interest Rates by 25 Basis Points
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Milan has suggested that the Federal Reserve should reduce interest rates by 50 basis points. However, it is anticipated that the actual rate cut will be 25 basis points.

data.title: A whale shorting $140 million in BTC turned long on 68.42 BTC and placed a $14.65 million BTC buy order near $111,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, a whale that shorted $140 million worth of BTC yesterday has switched to a long position, having just opened a 5x leveraged long position. The whale currently holds 68.42 BTC, valued at $7.62 million, at an opening price of $111,066.5. Furthermore, the whale has a $14.65 million limit buy order in the $111,000-$111,053 range.

data.title: Economic Shifts Highlight Structural Changes in Global Markets
data.description:
According to Foresight News, the global financial landscape is undergoing significant structural changes, driven by liquidity expansion and persistent structural inflation. Despite high policy rates, they remain below the threshold for economic tightening. The market is pricing in a soft landing, transitioning from speculative expansion to structural integration.

The Token2049 Singapore conference marks a pivotal shift from narrative-driven liquidity to income-supported yield data. Key market changes include the dominance of perpetual decentralized exchanges, the rise of prediction markets as functional derivatives, and the expansion of AI-related protocols with real Web2 applications. Liquidity decentralization is evident, with repledging and DAT reaching their peak.

Three structural drivers are influencing the macroeconomic framework: currency devaluation, demographic shifts, and liquidity pipelines. Asset inflation reflects currency devaluation rather than organic growth, with long-duration assets outperforming during liquidity expansion and leverage compressing during contraction.

Recession risks are highlighted by lagging indicators such as CPI and unemployment rates, which confirm economic downturns post-factum. The U.S. is in a late economic cycle rather than a recession, with a higher likelihood of a soft landing. Leading indicators include an inverted yield curve and controlled credit spreads, suggesting no imminent systemic stress. The labor market is gradually cooling, maintaining tight employment conditions.

Inflation dynamics present a "last mile" challenge, with commodity disinflation complete and service inflation anchoring overall CPI near 3%. This phase is the most complex since the 1980s, with wage growth near 4% sustaining high service inflation. Housing inflation lags in measurement, though real market rents have cooled.

Policy implications for the Federal Reserve involve balancing credibility with growth. Premature rate cuts risk reigniting inflation, while prolonged maintenance risks excessive tightening. The equilibrium outcome suggests a new inflation baseline closer to 3% rather than 2%.

Long-term inflation anchors include deglobalization, which increases transition costs through supply chain diversification; energy transitions, which raise short-term input costs due to capital-intensive low-carbon activities; and demographic shifts, which create structural labor shortages and persistent wage rigidity. These factors limit the Federal Reserve's ability to normalize without higher nominal growth or equilibrium inflation.

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Critical Support Test Amid Market Adjustments
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, BRN's research director Timothy Misir highlighted that Bitcoin is currently testing the crucial $110,000 support level, accompanied by a reduction in holdings by major investors and a surge in demand for put options. The volume of large put option trades has exceeded $1.15 billion, accounting for 28% of the fund flow, while call options remain concentrated in the $115,000 to $130,000 range. Misir clarified that this is a selective portfolio adjustment rather than a panic sell-off. He added that although holders of 10,000 to 100,000 BTC have reduced their holdings by approximately 17,500 BTC, they remain net buyers for the year, having increased their holdings by over 318,000 BTC, indicating a position adjustment rather than a large-scale exit.

21Shares research strategist Matt Mena emphasized Bitcoin's resilience amid macroeconomic headwinds and aggressive deleveraging, demonstrating that structural demand anchored by ETF inflows and dovish policy expectations continues to support the market. Over the past month, U.S. ETFs have attracted more than $6 billion. Mena noted that with leverage clearing and policy easing approaching, the outlook for the end of the year is increasingly positive. If institutional demand persists, Bitcoin could potentially reach $150,000. However, the short-term technical outlook remains fragile: if Bitcoin effectively breaks below $110,000, it may test the $104,000-$108,000 range; if it can reclaim $115,000, it will regain bullish momentum.

data.title: Why Is Crypto Down Today? – October 16, 2025
data.description:
The crypto market is down today. BTC fell to $110,774 and ETH to $3,993. “Without a renewed catalyst to lift prices back above $117,100, the market risks deeper contraction. ”

data.title: The US government holds 316,760 BTC worth $35.9 billion
data.description: Cointelegraph published an article on the X platform stating that according to CryptoQuant monitoring, the US government currently holds 316,760 BTC, worth approximately US$35.9 billion, making it one of the largest known BTC holders.

data.title: Majidage's positions have been partially liquidated, and he has lost over $53 million on Hyperliquid in the past month.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, the sudden market drop has just partially liquidated Majidage's positions. He has lost more than $53 million on Hyperliquid over the past month.

data.title: ZEROBASE (ZBT) will soon be listed on the Bybit spot platform
data.description: According to the official announcement, Bybit will list ZEROBASE (ZBT) on the spot market at 1 PM UTC on October 17th. A Token Splash of 5,000,000 ZBT and a Launchpool of 4,000,000 ZBT will be available for new and existing users to share. Users can earn rewards through staking, depositing, and trading. - Deposits open: October 17th, 4:00 AM (UTC) - Trading open: October 17th, 1:00 PM (UTC) - Withdrawals open: October 18th, 10:00 AM (UTC) ZEROBASE is a decentralized cryptographic infrastructure network that leverages zero-knowledge proofs (ZKPs) and trusted execution environments (TEEs) to enable verifiable off-chain computations. The network powers products like zkStaking, zkLogin, and ProofYield, bridging institutional-grade DeFi, user privacy, and real-world asset (RWA) strategies. ZEROBASE implements a programmable, compliance-aligned staking mechanism, providing trust through transparent cryptographic verification while protecting sensitive data from exposure.

data.title: Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $170 million yesterday, with only the 21Shares ETF TETH experiencing a net outflow
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Ethereum spot ETFs saw a total net inflow of $170 million yesterday (October 15th, EST). The Blackrock ETF ETHA saw the largest daily net inflow, with $164 million, bringing ETHA's total net inflow to $14.342 billion. The next largest daily net inflow was the Bitwise ETF ETHW, with $12.3065 million, bringing ETHW's total net inflow to $453 million. The 21 Shares ETF TETH saw the largest daily net outflow, with $7.9783 million, bringing TETH's total net inflow to $21.400 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of the Ethereum spot ETF was US$27.369 billion, the ETF net asset ratio (market value as a percentage of Ethereum's total market value) reached 5.72%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached US$14.886 billion.

data.title: Binance Wallet Astra Nova pre-sale exceeds 520 times of fundraising
data.description: According to official data, the presale of Binance Wallet's Astra Nova token (RVV) has exceeded its target by 520 times. The presale targeted 172.1 BNB, with 90,612 BNB already pledged.

data.title: Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $104 million yesterday, with none of the twelve ETFs experiencing a net inflow.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, Bitcoin spot ETFs saw a total net outflow of $104 million yesterday (October 15th, EST). The Grayscale GBTC ETF saw the largest daily net outflow, with $82.9036 million, bringing GBTC's total net outflow to $24.429 billion. The next largest outflow was the Invesco and Galaxy Digital ETF, BTCO, with a daily net outflow of $11.0986 million, bringing BTCO's total net inflow to $193 million. As of press time, the total net asset value of Bitcoin spot ETFs stood at $151.32 billion, with a net asset value ratio (market capitalization relative to the total Bitcoin market capitalization) of 6.83%, and cumulative net inflows reaching $62.442 billion.
